assessment_objectives.objective: the use of portable storage devices containing sensitive / regulated data on external systems is identified and documented.
limits on the use of portable storage devices containing sensitive / regulated data on external systems are defined.
the use of portable storage devices containing sensitive / regulated data on external systems is limited as defined.
restrictions on the use of organization-controlled portable storage devices by authorized individuals on external systems are defined.
the use of organization-controlled portable storage devices by authorized individuals on external systems is restricted.
